lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Blurberry.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Hi, are you ready to make your first cocktail?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Ok then, to start with make a Fruit Blast. Here, you'll need these ingredients, but I'm afraid I can't give you any more if you mess up.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: So where's my Fruit Blast?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: No, I need you to make the Fruit Blast yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: I can see how that would make it hard to mix cocktails. I'll give you another one, but please try not lose any more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've not finished yet.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Ok, well let me know when you're done.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: I don't know what you have there but it's no Fruit Blast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Hmmm... not bad, not bad at all.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Now can you make me a Pineapple Punch? I can give you what you need, but again I won't be able to give you any more if you make a mistake.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Let me know when it's done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Blurberry.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: How are you faring with the Pineapple Punch?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: No, I need you to make the Pineapple Punch yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Not bad, not bad at all.... I can certainly sell drinks of that quality.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Okay then let's try something with some real booze in it! Make me a Wizard Blizzard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Blurberry.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Hello, how did it go with the Wizard Blizzard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: No, I need you to make the Wizard Blizzard yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't managed to make it yet.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Ok, it's one Wizard Blizzard I need. Let me know when it's done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here, try some.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Well that is both Wizardy and Blizzardy. You're quite a bartender.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Okay, let's test you once more. Make me a SGG, then we'll see if you have what it takes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A what?

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: A Short Green Guy, and don't bring me a gnome. Here's all you need.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll try my best.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: I'm sure you'll make a great barman.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Blurberry.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: So, have you got my Short Green Guy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've got one.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: No, I need you to make the SGG yourself. I'm afraid it doesn't really work if you try to sell the bar its own drinks.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: I don't know what you have there but it's no Fruit Blast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Ooh, that's a frisky little number. Very tart, how it should be. Excellent. Well I'm happy to recommend you to the Giannes. You truly are a gnomish bartender now..

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Well your training is over [player name]. Are you interested in some work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I may be...

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: I think you're almost ready to do some work for Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of a new family venture: Gnome Food Delivery. There are good tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods - though you may

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfil some of the other orders...

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: However, you'll need some basic gnome cooking training if you want to work for Lufty. Go and have a chat with his Dad, Aluft Gianne Snr. Hel'll tell you what you need to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help!

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Aluft Gianne Snr. tells me that you have finished training with him, so I think you're ready to do some work for Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of the new Gnome Food Delivery service. I've heard there are

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: good tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods - though you may have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfill some of the other orders...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting....

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Go and have a chat with my young Lufty Jnr. and he'll fill you in with details.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Well your training is over [player name]. Are you interested in some work?

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Aluft Gianne Snr. tells me that you have finished training with him, so I think you're ready to do some work for Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of the new Gnome Food Delivery service. I've heard there are

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Well hello there traveller. If you're looking for a cocktail the barman will happily make you one.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Or if you're looking for some training in cocktail making, then I'm your gnome! Aluft Gianne jnr. is looking for gnome cooks, barmen and barwomen to help in his new venture, so it's a useful skill to have. I'm

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: sure the human [boys/girls] will like it as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I prefer to stay this side of the bar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok then I'll give it a go.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Excellent. It's not an easy job, I'll have to try you out first. I'm sure you'll be great though.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Here, take this cocktail guide. The book tells you how to make all the cocktails we serve. I'll tell you what I need and you can make them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Take a look at the book then come and talk to me.
